non_tie_analysis.interpretation: Non-tie outcomes are not determined only by whether full SQL results have <=20 rows. When <=20, rows[:20] already covers the full result; wins usually come from explanation completeness, actionability, unsupported claims, or severity caps. When >20, evidence coverage can matter, but the final winner is still determined by judge metric scores and caps.
